notes: Unplayable due to black textures for walls and floors. Runs at a relatively stable 60fps, has some framedrops when switching between dimensions initially (dropped to about 53fps from 60fps for me), but this issue could be present on Windows. Subsequent dimension switches were fine. Steam Controller works. If the texture issues ever get fixed, this game would be perfectly playable.
title: Quantum Conundrum

notes: Completely black rendered textures make the game unplayable.
title: Quantum Conundrum

cpu: AMD A8-7600 Radeon R7, 10 Compute Cores 4C+6G
notes: Install vcrun2008 using winetricks for the WINEPREFIX=~/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/200010/pfx and the building from the inside lights up normally. The only downside is the "Download Content." The mouse pointer does not show up when the Steam browser opens up. So if you want to add DLC, that must be done outside the game.
title: Quantum Conundrum

notes: As suggested by a previous review: Set WINEPREFIX=~/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/200010/pfx to run winetricks for the correct prefix. In winetricks, install vcrun2008. This fixed the black textures. I came across no further issues.
title: Quantum Conundrum

notes: Tried installing vcrun2008 black textures are still everywhere, makes the game unplayable
title: Quantum Conundrum

notes: Experienced the same black texture rendering issue, which made the game initially unplayable. Was resolved upon installing vcrun2008 to the correct wine prefix using winetricks/protontricks.
title: Quantum Conundrum

notes: Had to install vcrun2008 to fix the black textures problem. I recommend using Protontricks to do this, or following the method others have mentioned. Other than that, everything worked great. A full 60fps except on loading screens where it dipped to 12fps. Perfectly playable.
title: Quantum Conundrum

notes: Works well after installing vcrun2008 (thanks to the other reporters for the hint!)
title: Quantum Conundrum

notes:
As others mentioned, it runs perfectly after installing vcrun2008. 

1. Install protontricks: $ pip install --user protontricks
2. Install vcrun2008: $ protontricks 200010 vcrun2008
title: Quantum Conundrum

notes: As with other users, I had a lot of black textures until I installed vcrun2008. After that it worked perfectly fine.
title: Quantum Conundrum

notes: Using protontricks to install vcrun2008 fixed the lighting issues. A little laggy, but nothing unplayable so far.
title: Quantum Conundrum
